conversion.omittedDataInput: The MCP schema leaves dataInput absent and its HTTP client serializes absence as an empty string. pi-leetcode-tools instead resolves the problem's exact untrimmed defaultTestcase and refuses to dispatch when none exists, preserving the documented default-test behavior without an ambiguous empty payload.

conversion.cnUsername: The upstream CN username field is retained as displayName when it differs; userSlug is exposed as the stable canonical username.
conversion.modelVisibility: The authenticated status capability is intentionally non-model-facing and is available only through Gateway RPC.

conversion.sourceCode: Set includeCode=true for the upstream full-report equivalent; metadata-only is the safer default.

conversion.globalMostRecent: The public contract accepts MOST_RECENT and sends the valid GraphQL enum without the upstream registry typo's leading space.
conversion.cnHasMore: When the upstream CN query omits pageInfo, hasMore is derived from totalNum and the bounded offset page instead of being forced false.

conversion.resourcePayload: Call lc_problem with includeResourcePayload=true for the complete problem://{titleSlug} equivalent.

conversion.transport: The MCP resource URI is represented by the same versioned lc_solution contract without retaining MCP transport at runtime.
